content.full_text:
January 18, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission  
Ms. Alice Hughes  
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division  
428 J Street  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, Ca. 95804-0807

Dear Ms. Hughes:

After recent communication with the Commission, it was indicated by Mr. Gregory W. Baugher that any future assistance I would need be directed to you.

I am a Past Director of San Juan Suburban Water District as a result of last November's election. The San Juan Suburban Water District supplies water wholesale to Fair Oaks Water District as well as several other Water Districts. Currently I am in my 18th year as an employee of the Fair Oaks Water District.

My desire is to become a Director of the Fair Oaks Water District after the November 1992 election and my present residence address, 7990 Moss Street in Fair Oaks, qualifies me geographically to be a representative on the Fair Oaks Water District Board of Directors. In 1985 I requested documentation as to the legality of my participation as a Board Member of the San Juan Suburban Water District while being an employee of another water district. Your department supplied the document I needed and I did need to present it on one occasion which quickly removed any doubt of legality.

My request is for documentation I can present upon request to any official who may challenge the legality of a Board Member who is also a subordinate of the District.

Very truly yours,

Glenn A. Miller  
P.O. Box 1676  
Fair Oaks, Ca. 95628
